ddls:
CREATE TABLE "universities" (
  "university_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each university */,
  "university_name" TEXT /* Name of the university */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the university is located */,
  "control" TEXT /* Control of the institution (e.g., Private, Public) */,
  "total_students" INTEGER /* Total number of students enrolled in the university */,
  "founding_year" INTEGER /* Year the university was founded */,
  "location_city" TEXT /* City where the university is located */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website URL of the university */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the university */,
  "email" TEXT /* Contact email for the university */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("university_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_universities_state FOREIGN KEY ("state") REFERENCES states ("state_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "tuition_fees" (
  "fee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tuition fee record */,
  "university_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the university */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year for which the tuition fee is recorded */,
  "in_state_fee" INTEGER /* Tuition fee amount for in-state students in USD */,
  "out_of_state_fee" INTEGER /* Tuition fee amount for out-of-state students in USD */,
  "international_fee" INTEGER /* Tuition fee amount for international students in USD */,
  "housing_fee" INTEGER /* Housing fee (if applicable) in USD */,
  "meal_plan_fee" INTEGER /* Meal plan fee (if applicable) in USD */,
  "books_and_supplies" INTEGER /* Estimated cost for books and supplies in USD */,
  "other_fees" INTEGER /* Other fees (e.g., lab fees, activity fees) in USD */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tuition_fees_university_id FOREIGN KEY ("university_id") REFERENCES universities ("university_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "states" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Name of the state */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the state is located (e.g., South, Midwest) */,
  "population" TEXT /* Population of the state */,
  "capital_city" TEXT /* Capital city of the state */,
  "governor" TEXT /* Name of the current governor */,
  "senators" TEXT /* Names of the current senators */,
  "median_income" INTEGER /* Median household income in the state */,
  "unemployment_rate" REAL /* Unemployment rate in the state */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, administrator, public user) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the user account is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "university_id" INTEGER /* ID of the university being accessed */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the tuition fee data being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  "access_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access session in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_university_id FOREIGN KEY ("university_id") REFERENCES universities ("university_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the report (e.g., annual, regional comparison) */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description or summary of the report */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., draft, published) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the report was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_validations" (
  "validation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each validation event */,
  "university_id" INTEGER /* ID of the university being validated */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the tuition fee data being validated */,
  "validation_date" TEXT /* Date when the validation was performed */,
  "validator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the validator (user who performed the validation) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the validation (e.g., approved, rejected) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments from the validator regarding the validation */,
  "validation_type" TEXT /* Type of validation (e.g., initial, follow-up) */,
  "method" TEXT /* Method used for validation (e.g., manual, automated) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("validation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_validations_university_id FOREIGN KEY ("university_id") REFERENCES universities ("university_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_validations_validator_id FOREIGN KEY ("validator_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
